task_description: Upgrade the PC blocker to professional/sellable quality: expand domain blocking to cover ALL harmful content and addictions (drugs, alcohol, self-harm, gambling, violence, piracy, dark web, dating), add AI chatbot assistant for recovery help and troubleshooting, rewrite scripts with proper error handling and professional UI, add menu-driven interface.

verification.summary: All 10 domain list files verified (1126 domains with 559 www variants). All 7 batch scripts have proper error handling and logging. AI assistant web app has all required files (HTML, CSS, JS, config, offline responses, README). Menu principal correctly links to AI assistant. All scripts check admin permissions and log to CleanShield-log.txt.
